title: Thylacitis maritima
taxonomy: Thylacitis maritima is classified as a species of extinct flowering plant. It belongs to the family Proteaceae and is thought to be closely related to the genus Thylacopsis. More specifically, its classification can be broken down as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Angiospermophyta, Class: Magnoliopsida, Order: Proteales, Family: Proteaceae, Genus: Thylacitis. The classification of Thylacitis maritima is based on fossil evidence and molecular analysis. Thylacitis maritima is an important subject of study in the field of paleobotany.
